operationName: Operation Swords of Iron (Israel) / October 7 War
heroHeadline: Ceasefire Holds as IDF Targeted Strikes Continue; Hamas Signals Resistance to Disarmament
heroSubtitle: 690+ Palestinians killed since October ceasefire; Board of Peace presses 8-month disarmament roadmap; UNDP aid suspended after contraband found at crossing
footerNote: Data sourced from IDF, Hamas, UN OCHA, UNRWA, WHO, ICJ, ICC, Times of Israel, and Haaretz. Gaza death toll: 72,267+ confirmed killed since Oct 7, 2023 (Gaza Ministry of Health / UN OCHA, Mar 27 2026). ICC arrest warrants issued for Netanyahu and Gallant (Nov 2024). Board of Peace established Jan 2026 under UN Resolution 2803.
